properties.name: Kasumbalesa Border (DRC)
properties.wounding_strategy: The Mineral 'Neurology': Instead of attacking a nation's military bases, rivals will weaponize local labor unions, fund eco-terrorist sabotage, or buy up the specific port terminals where cobalt leaves Africa. Paralyzing these specific, narrow export routes starves the West and Asian rivals of the materials needed for EV transition and next-gen military tech.

properties.name: Kourou Spaceport (Fr. Guiana)
properties.wounding_strategy: Equatorial Aerospace Corridors: The Earth's rotation provides the most fuel-efficient trajectory for satellite launches near the equator. Controlling the physical Earth-to-orbit corridor is as critical as controlling the oceans.

properties.name: Penang Hub (Malaysia)
properties.wounding_strategy: Secondary Tech-Packaging Hubs: The strategy is asymmetric disruption. Why attack Taiwan—which is a heavily fortified 'porcupine'—when you can quietly fund a ransomware attack on a power grid in Malaysia?

properties.name: Clarion-Clipperton Zone
properties.wounding_strategy: The Cabbage Strategy / Deep-Sea Resource Denial: International waters rich in polymetallic nodules. Superpowers will send 'scientific survey' vessels that slowly morph into exclusionary zones.

properties.name: Svalbard Satellite Station (Norway)
properties.wounding_strategy: Civil-Military Fusion: The world's largest commercial ground station for polar-orbiting satellites. A 'rogue' trawler severing its subsea cables blinds global weather and commercial Earth-observation satellites.

properties.name: Port of Walvis Bay (Namibia)
properties.wounding_strategy: Supply Chain Chokepoint: The hyper-efficient exit node for Central African rare earths. A localized ransomware attack or financed union strike here paralyses the supply chain.

properties.name: Pantanal Wetlands (Brazil/Bolivia)
properties.wounding_strategy: Demographic / Environmental Weaponization: Covert funding of illegal land-clearing or water diversion projects designed to trigger massive, localized climate shocks.
